raw_consumer_statement: This account has been about XXXX yrs old I had contacted this company so many times regarding this account I had stated that I can only account for about or near {$1000.00} of it which I had paid to try to keep my credit score ok However Best buy continue to overlook this and continue to send me high balances and interests I has explained that I did a identity theft over a yr plus ago because someone had gotten my information and took me for a lot but best buy continue to send me monthly bills demanding {$700.00} a month for a minimum payment.they has a balance of {$3500.00} which to me seems to be majority interest I am a senior citizen on a fixed income no way I could afford to pay this kind of money for stuff I didn't purchase this is totally unfair were living in times where scamming seems to be the norm and we have to suffer to fix something we didn't break it's not right I try to give something because it's my name & credit being damaged.
